\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Abstract simulation domain class for SIE scattering. 

A \doxylink{classDomain}{Domain} represents a volumetric region bounded by a surface mesh on which Rao–\+Wilton–\+Glisson (RWG) basis functions live. It stores incident fields, constructs a BSP tree for robust inside/outside queries, and provides a Green\textquotesingle{}s function handle and a chosen SIE formulation to assemble the linear system. Concrete subclasses (e.\+g., homogeneous vs. layered) supply material properties and cross‑section computations. 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{Domain_8h_source}{Domain.\+h}}.
